input:
Among them were Abū Bakr, ʿUmar and ʿAlī. He sat down with his companions close to a house which belonged to the Jews. The chiefs of the al-Naḍīr tribe left them there pretending that they were about to raise some money to contribute to the ransom the Prophet had to pay. When they were alone, some of the Jews said: “You will never find the man as easy prey as he is now. Let a strong person go onto the roof of the house next to which Muhammad is sitting and drop a large stone or rock over his head and rid us of him.” One of them, ʿAmr ibn Jiḥāsh ibn Kaʿb, volunteered to commit this treacherous crime.
Source: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, Ch. 22: Vulnerability and Treachery

output.scene_title: The Plot to Attack the Prophet
output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, Ch. 22: Vulnerability and Treachery

characters.name: Prophet Muhammad (PBUH)
characters.appearance: Early 50s, medium build, dignified upright posture. Wearing a simple white thobe with a green cloak draped over shoulders, white turban with tail between shoulder blades. Simple leather sandals. Always shown from behind, face never visible. Distinguished by green cloak and subtle warm light.

characters.name: Abū Bakr al-Siddiq
characters.appearance: Late 40s, light olive skin, slender build, slightly shorter than average. Thin grey-streaked beard with slight reddish henna tint, neatly kept. Wearing off-white cotton thobe, plain brown woolen cloak, white cloth wrapped as loose head covering. Worn leather sandals. Kind gentle eyes, slightly stooped shoulders.

characters.name: ʿUmar ibn al-Khaṭṭāb
characters.appearance: Early 40s, dark olive skin, muscular build, slightly taller than average. Thick beard with slight reddish henna tint, neatly kept. Wearing off-white cotton thobe, simple brown woolen cloak, plain white cloth wrapped as loose head covering. Worn leather sandals. Strong facial features, confident posture.

characters.name: ʿAlī ibn Abī Ṭālib
characters.appearance: Teenager, light olive skin, slender build, slightly younger than average. Slight darkening on his chin, starting to grow beard. Wearing simple off-white cotton thobe, plain white cloth wrapped as loose head covering. Worn leather sandals. Bright inquisitive eyes, energetic posture.

characters.name: ʿAmr ibn Jiḥāsh ibn Kaʿb
characters.appearance: Middle-aged, dark olive skin, medium build, average height. Thick beard with slight reddish henna tint, neatly kept. Wearing off-white cotton thobe, simple brown woolen cloak, plain white cloth wrapped as loose head covering. Worn leather sandals. Strong facial features, slightly menacing posture.

characters.name: Jewish Chief
characters.appearance: Middle-aged, light olive skin, medium build, average height. Thick beard with slight reddish henna tint, neatly kept. Wearing simple off-white cotton thobe, plain white cloth wrapped as loose head covering. Worn leather sandals. Wise, calculating eyes, composed posture.

output.moral_lesson: The path to success lies not in treachery and deceit, but in honesty and mutual respect.
output.narrative_text: The chiefs of the al-Naḍīr tribe pretended to help the Prophet, but secretly plotted to attack him. They wanted someone strong to drop a rock on his head, but one of them, ʿAmr ibn Jiḥāsh ibn Kaʿb, volunteered to commit this treacherous crime.

compliance.notes: Prophet shown from behind, backlit by sunlight. Antagonists shown with full faces, no graphic violence depicted. Appropriate for children.

output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor illustration. Exterior of a simple 7th century Makkah mud-brick house, with a narrow alley in front. A man in white thobe and green cloak, white turban, seen entirely from behind, standing beside the house with warm sunlight streaming behind him. Nearby, a group of men in simple off-white cotton thobes, plain head coverings, chatting with a Jewish chief in a similar thobe. In the background, a strong-built man in off-white thobe, simple brown cloak, plain head covering, is seen from behind, looking at the group with a mischievous intent. Simple mud-brick walls, clay water jug in corner. Medium shot, eye level. Warm golden palette. No modern objects.
